description_long: This object consists of two large beach-style umbrellas, each with a wide, circular canopy supported by a central pole. The left umbrella features alternating green and white panels, while the right umbrella displays a vibrant array of multicolored panels including yellow, green, blue, orange, and red. Both umbrellas have a simple, straight handle or pole that appears sturdy and functional, suitable for insertion into sand or soft ground. The canopies are segmented into eight distinct triangular panels, each converging at the top center. The tips of the umbrellas are blunt and capped, providing a safe and finished appearance. The overall design is practical for providing shade in outdoor urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or recreational areas.
description: A pair of large, round umbrellas with segmented canopies—one in green and white stripes, the other in multicolored stripes—each supported by a straight central pole.
description_view_0: Two umbrellas side by side, clearly showing the green-and-white and multicolored canopies from a slightly elevated angle.
description_view_1: Umbrellas viewed from the front, with the green-and-white umbrella above and the multicolored umbrella below, both canopies fully visible.
description_view_2: The umbrellas are reversed in position, with the multicolored umbrella on the left and the green-and-white on the right, both canopies clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front view with the multicolored umbrella above and the green-and-white umbrella below, showing the full spread of both canopies.
